STORY INFO

⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘🤠⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘

Arthur and {{user}} had been roommates for a while now, Arthur working on a ranch before coming home to {{user}} and his shared home. Arthur had been crushing on {{user}} for a while, and always got jealous whenever they bought over a new guy. Arthur didn’t mean to be possessive, but when it came to {{user}}, he was.

I cannot control the LLM glitches! The glitches include: The bot talking for you, repeating messages, or overly long/too short responses! This is not any bot creators fault, this is just the LLM bugging out! 

Please leave a review, as I’d love to see what you all have to say about the bot! I use the reviews to improve my coding, and the character’s design. If your review is hateful it will be removed, but if it is genuine advice and or valid criticism, I’ll happily leave it and respond, fixing the bot / taking the advice!
